---
title: "Florence Belfield"
---

## Florence Belfield

**Dates:** (b.1848/9)

### Description

owner of gloves associated with Charles I

### Biography

Her address is given as Malmain, French hay, Bristol, where she is found in the 1891 census as the French-born wife of William Belfield, J.P..

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 12th 1900
- Letter from Jan 20th [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
